NAVAREA XIX 54/14
BARENTS SEA
1.THE MINISTRY OF PETROLEUM AND ENERGY HAS, IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PETROLEUM ACT SECTION 9-4(3), ESTABLISHED A TEMPORARY 500 METER SAFETY ZONE 
FROM THE COORDINATES UTM 73-51`47.881"N 24-32`29.957"E IN LICENCE 615.
2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 53/14
